items.title: Get up to $1,043 exclusive savings on Yozma’s electric IN 10 or IN 10 Pro dirt bikes + FREE gear, more – all starting from $1,044
items.summary:
Yozma is currently celebrating its birthday with an Anniversary Sale that is taking $500 off two of its electric mini dirt bikes while also offering FREE gifts and an exclusive 5% bonus savings for our readers after using the code Electrek at checkout. Things start with the Yozma IN 10 Off-Road Electric Mini Dirt Bike at $1,044.05 shipped, after using the above code, beating out its Amazon pricing by $55 – not to mention you’ll also be getting an extra one-year warranty ($99 value), a gift box ($299 value), and a cycling bag ($50 value). The dirt bike goes for $1,599 at full price, which the bundled gear would push up to $2,047 with no discounts there. The combined $555 exclusive markdown on the dirt bike drops it to the second-lowest price we have tracked, behind the one-time exclusive deal from April for $999, though the added value of the bundle makes this the most savings we’ve seen. You can also find the more premium IN 10 Pro High-Performance Electric Dirt Bike down at $1,804.05 shipped, after using the above code, beating Amazon by $95. Head below to learn more about this sale and these two models. Learn more below, or check out our IN 10 review or IN 10 Pro review.

@starlink:

items.title: Grab EGO’s 56V 18-inch misting fan down at $259 or the 10-inch oscillating variant at a $169 low
items.summary:
Amazon is currently offering the EGO POWER+ 56V 18-inch Portable Misting Fan at $259 shipped. Down from a full price of $310, discounts in 2026 have seen this model mostly taken down to $280, $278, and then $249 in mid-May. If you missed out on that May discount, you’re getting the next-best rate of this year with the $51 markdown here. You can also save a bit more by going with the smaller 10-inch oscillating misting fan at its $169 low.

items.summary:
